name: Scout
description:
So first off, let me start by saying that Prisoner 775 and Chamalien (aka "Overkill") are some of my absolute favorite Ben 10 aliens, and they both deserved so much better than they got.

And well, I love the design and concept so much that I actually ended up coming up with a character based off it as well as a story featuring them. And I figured I'd make a bot of it for other people to use

As a side note, I thought about using this image for the profile, which fits the beginning perfectly but may not work so well later in the story.

I may also make an ai for Prisoner 775 as well.
creator: Kratos_Zangoose
